# Regex fixtures for skill: capture-knowledge
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from deploy-gate MATCH fixture.

MATCH: capture this knowledge before we forget it
MATCH: save the decision we made about the database schema today
MATCH: remember the gotcha we hit with the build environment

NO_MATCH: deploy to production tonight
